name: revops-factory-demo
description: RevOps Software Factory — a coordinator + specialist agents that review a synthetic HubSpot CRM batch and emit one approval-biased verdict, with a live token-cost ledger. Public portfolio demo. Ports Cloudflare's multi-agent code-review factory into RevOps.

scripts.build:test-engine: tsc src/components/engine.ts src/components/types.ts src/data/expected-findings.ts --outDir tests/.engine-build --target es2022 --module nodenext --moduleResolution nodenext --skipLibCheck
